campaign.title: Claim Your Listing
campaign.subject: Your business is already in our directory - claim it now
campaign.description: Show SMB their auto-generated listing and invite them to claim/polish it for free

landing_page.ai_goal: Get user to claim their listing immediately

slides.title: We Built This For You

content.headline: We Built This For your business
content.subhead: Your listing is ready. Take a look.

slides.narration: Hey there, we did something for your business. We went ahead and created your business listing. It's ready to go live—you just need to claim it. Take a look at what we built.

slides.title: Your Listing Preview

content.headline: Here's How You'll Appear

listing_preview.description: A trusted local business serving the community

content.note: We created this from public information. You can edit everything.

slides.narration: This is how your business will appear in our directory. We pulled this together from public information—your name, category, location. You can edit any of it once you claim it. Add photos, update your description, make it yours.

slides.title: What Happens When You Claim
slides.narration: When you claim this listing, four things happen. One: you appear in our local directory searches—real people looking for businesses like yours. Two: search tools start learning you exist and can recommend you. Three: you get connected to our news, events, and community platforms. Four: you get insights on who's viewing and engaging with your business.

slides.title: Join Local Businesses

testimonial.quote: Claimed my listing in 5 minutes. Got my first inquiry that week.
testimonial.author: Local Business Owner

slides.narration: You're not the first. 500 businesses in your city have already claimed their listings. On average, listings get 1,200 views per month. And business owners tell us they get inquiries within the first week. One owner said: 'Claimed my listing in five minutes. Got my first inquiry that week.'

slides.title: Claiming Takes 5 Minutes

content.headline: 5 Minutes. That's It.
content.note: No credit card. No commitment. Edit anytime.

slides.narration: Claiming takes five minutes. Step one: verify you're the owner—just confirm your email or phone. Step two: review the information we pulled together. Step three: add a photo if you want—optional but recommended. Step four: hit publish. That's it. No credit card required. No commitment. You can edit anytime.

slides.title: Claim Your Listing Now

content.headline: Your Listing Is Ready
content.subhead: Claim it now and start being found
content.urgency: Your competitors may already be listed
content.trust: Free forever • No credit card • Edit anytime

slides.narration: Your listing is ready. Click 'Claim This Listing' and you'll be live in five minutes. Want to review and customize first? That's fine too—take your time. Either way, this is yours. Free forever. Your community is already searching. Let's make sure they find you.

email_hook.subject: Your business listing in [Community Name]'s directory is ready
email_hook.body:
Hi [First Name],

Your business is already listed in [Community Name]'s business directory. We created it from public information — your name, category, and location.

Here's what it looks like:

[SEE YOUR LISTING →]

When you claim it (5 minutes):

→ You verify and edit your information
→ You appear in [Community Name] Day.News directory searches
→ You connect to our news and events network
→ You see who's viewing your listing

Free. No credit card. Edit anytime.

[CLAIM YOUR LISTING →]

[X] businesses in [Community Name] have already claimed theirs.

[AM Name]
[Community Name] Day.News
